name: anything2skill
description: Distill content you've seen (videos, courses, articles, transcripts) into agent-callable Claude skills. Value pre-check labels each skill honestly; fusion protocol keeps your skill library from bloating (same-source deepen, same-skeleton-across-domains factor, conflicts kept separate). Token-heavy reading runs on a bundled Sonnet subagent; the judgment runs on your model. No DRM circumvention. Anonymous opt-out telemetry.
